case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. LEVESTER WALLACE

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED DEC-18-2010, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLACE, LEVESTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 462 DUBOCE STREET, #402, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94117, LEASE FORFEITED, **TO INCLUDE UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LEVESTER DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LEVESTER DOES 1-10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LEVESTER
